disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No throat tightness/closing, no lip/tongue swelling, no audible wheeze, no difficulty swallowing
trigger_question_examples: Any tightness or feeling of your throat closing, or swelling of lips/tongue?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No throat tightness or swelling, no wheeze — it's my nose that's blocked, I can breathe through my mouth.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prominent itch of nose/palate/eyes with sudden allergen-triggered onset, no viral prodrome/fever
trigger_question_examples: Is there itching of your nose, palate or eyes, and did it start suddenly after an exposure?
Any fever or feeling generally unwell beforehand?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, my nose, palate and eyes itch, it started suddenly after the dust, and I didn't feel unwell or feverish first.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No high fever, no productive/purulent cough, no localized facial pain
trigger_question_examples: Any high fever, coughing up phlegm, or bad facial pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, no phlegm, no facial pain.
